about_text_1: Los audรยญfonos son dispositivos sofisticados, pero su adaptaciรยณn sigue dependiendo en gran medida de evaluaciones subjetivas y enfoques de prueba y error. En Novaural, creemos que cada paciente merece una adaptaciรยณn verificada objetivamente y optimizada cuantitativamente.

challenge_title:
La Adaptaciรยณn de Audรยญfonos Sigue Siendo

challenge_subtitle: A pesar de los avances en tecnologรยญa de audรยญfonos, el proceso de adaptaciรยณn apenas ha cambiado. Tres problemas clave persisten en toda la industria.
challenge_card1_text: Los pacientes vuelven repetidamente porque las adaptaciones se ajustan segรยบn comentarios vagos รขยย "suena demasiado metรยกlico" o "no puedo oรยญr en restaurantes". Cada visita cuesta tiempo y dinero sin garantรยญa de mejora.

challenge_card3_text: Los datos de la industria muestran un abandono significativo de audรยญfonos. Los pacientes que no experimentan una mejora clara rรยกpidamente probablemente dejarรยกn de usar sus dispositivos por completo.

beyond_label: Mรยกs Allรยก de lo Clรยญnico
beyond_subtitle: La tecnologรยญa patentada de Novaural no se limita a los audรยญfonos. Puede aplicarse a cualquier dispositivo de audio de consumo con salida de frecuencia ajustable รขยย desde AirPods y auriculares inalรยกmbricos hasta cascos, dispositivos AR/VR y gafas con audio.
beyond_problem_title: El Volumen No Es la Respuesta
beyond_problem_subtitle: Millones de personas tienen dificultades para entender el habla a travรยฉs de sus auriculares รขยย no porque necesiten audรยญfonos, sino porque sus oรยญdos tienen carencias sutiles de frecuencia que un simple aumento de volumen no puede corregir.
beyond_card1_text: Cuando el habla suena poco clara, la reacciรยณn natural es subir el volumen. Pero esto amplifica todas las frecuencias por igual รขยย incluidas las que oyes perfectamente, exponiendo las frecuencias sanas a niveles de presiรยณn sonora potencialmente daรยฑinos con el tiempo.
beyond_card2_text: Incluso cuando "puedes oรยญr" a travรยฉs de tus auriculares, tu cerebro trabaja constantemente mรยกs para rellenar los huecos en las frecuencias donde tu percepciรยณn es mรยกs dรยฉbil. Este esfuerzo inconsciente causa fatiga auditiva รขยย haciendo que llamadas, podcasts y mรยบsica sean agotadores con uso prolongado.
beyond_card3_text: Los cambios auditivos relacionados con la edad comienzan tan pronto como a los 30 aรยฑos, afectando tรยญpicamente primero las altas frecuencias. La mayorรยญa no lo nota รขยย compensan inconscientemente con el volumen, daรยฑando gradualmente las frecuencias que aรยบn funcionan bien.
beyond_solution_title: Inteligencia de Frecuencia Especรยญfica, No Volumen
beyond_solution_subtitle: En lugar de amplificar todo, Novaural identifica exactamente quรยฉ frecuencias del habla te cuestan รขยย y ajusta solo esas, dejando las frecuencias sanas intactas.
beyond_chart_label: Ejemplo de ajuste por banda รขยย solo se modifican las bandas con dรยฉficit
beyond_text_1: Nuestra tecnologรยญa evalรยบa tu discriminaciรยณn de sonidos del habla รขยย la capacidad de distinguir sonidos del habla similares como "caza" vs "casa" o "pez" vs "vez" รขยย en frecuencias especรยญficas usando un test rรยกpido y cientรยญficamente validado.
beyond_text_2: Basรยกndose en tus resultados, el sistema genera ajustes precisos por frecuencia que pueden aplicarse al ecualizador de cualquier dispositivo compatible. Solo se modifican las frecuencias donde muestras un dรยฉficit medido รขยย tรยญpicamente de solo 1รขยย3 dB.
beyond_text_3: รยฟEl resultado? El habla se vuelve mรยกs clara sin ningรยบn aumento de volumen general. Tu cerebro ya no necesita esforzarse para decodificar lo que oye, y tus frecuencias sanas permanecen protegidas a sus niveles naturales.
beyond_benefits_title: Los Beneficios del Audio de Frecuencia Especรยญfica
beyond_benefits_subtitle: Un ajuste sutil e inteligente en cรยณmo tu dispositivo entrega el audio puede tener un impacto transformador en tu experiencia auditiva diaria.
beyond_safe_sub: Protege la audiciรยณn que tienes
beyond_safe_1: Sin necesidad de aumentar el volumen general para entender el habla

beyond_safe_3: Previene el daรยฑo gradual por ruido de la sobreamplificaciรยณn diaria
beyond_safe_4: Los ajustes estรยกn limitados por lรยญmites de seguridad acรยบstica integrados en el algoritmo
beyond_safe_5: Especialmente crรยญtico para usuarios que escuchan durante perรยญodos prolongados (viajeros, teletrabajadores, estudiantes)
beyond_fatigue_title: Reducciรยณn de la Fatiga Auditiva
beyond_fatigue_1: Cuando las frecuencias del habla estรยกn al nivel correcto, tu cerebro procesa el audio con menos esfuerzo
beyond_fatigue_2: Reduce la tensiรยณn inconsciente de "rellenar los huecos" de las frecuencias dรยฉbiles
beyond_fatigue_3: Las llamadas, reuniones y podcasts se sienten menos agotadores en sesiones largas
beyond_fatigue_4: Mayor confort durante el uso de auriculares todo el dรยญa
beyond_fatigue_5: El beneficio se acumula durante semanas y meses de uso diario
beyond_obj_text: A diferencia de los "perfiles de sonido" genรยฉricos o los presets de EQ basados en preferencias, los ajustes de Novaural se derivan de un test de discriminaciรยณn del habla validado psicofรยญsicamente รขยย midiendo la percepciรยณn real, no la opiniรยณn. Dos oyentes con tests de audiciรยณn idรยฉnticos pueden necesitar ajustes diferentes segรยบn cรยณmo su cerebro procesa el habla, y nuestra tecnologรยญa captura esto.
beyond_lang_text: El sistema se adapta a la estructura fonรยฉmica de cualquier idioma mediante archivos de configuraciรยณn intercambiables. Ya sea que escuches predominantemente en inglรยฉs, espaรยฑol, mandarรยญn o cualquier otro idioma, la evaluaciรยณn y los ajustes se calibran para los sonidos del habla especรยญficos que importan en tu idioma.
beyond_device_text: Cualquier dispositivo de audio de consumo con bandas de frecuencia ajustables รขยย AirPods, Galaxy Buds, Sony WF-1000XM, auriculares over-ear, dispositivos de conducciรยณn รยณsea, cascos AR/VR รขยย puede beneficiarse. La tecnologรยญa se adapta a cualquier arquitectura de ecualizador que use tu dispositivo, desde sistemas de 5 bandas hasta mรยกs de 20.
beyond_science_title: Respaldado por la Ciencia, Protegido por Patente
beyond_science_text: Construido sobre investigaciรยณn audiolรยณgica revisada por pares y el sistema de rasgos distintivos de Jakobson-Halle-Fant. La metodologรยญa รขยย desde la evaluaciรยณn de sonidos del habla hasta la modificaciรยณn de salida especรยญfica por frecuencia รขยย estรยก cubierta por nuestra solicitud de patente de 47 reivindicaciones presentada en UKIPO.
beyond_who_title: No Solo para Pรยฉrdida Auditiva
beyond_who_subtitle: No necesitas un audรยญfono para beneficiarte de un audio mรยกs inteligente. La tecnologรยญa de Novaural ayuda a cualquier persona cuya percepciรยณn en el espectro de frecuencias del habla no sea perfectamente uniforme รขยย lo que incluye a la mayorรยญa de los adultos mayores de 30.
beyond_who_adults_text: Los cambios de alta frecuencia relacionados con la edad comienzan a los 30. La mayorรยญa no lo nota hasta que se vuelve significativo รขยย pero las carencias sutiles ya afectan la claridad a travรยฉs de auriculares.
beyond_who_remote_text: Las horas de videollamadas a travรยฉs de auriculares producen fatiga. Cuando las frecuencias del habla estรยกn correctamente equilibradas, las reuniones son menos agotadoras y la comprensiรยณn mejora en entornos ruidosos.
beyond_who_students_text: Escuchar clases, cursos de idiomas o audiolibros a travรยฉs de auriculares se vuelve mรยกs claro y menos agotador, especialmente cuando se estudia en un segundo idioma con fonemas desconocidos.
beyond_who_music: Entusiastas de la Mรยบsica y el Audio
beyond_who_music_text: Mรยกs allรยก del habla, la calibraciรยณn de frecuencia especรยญfica puede revelar detalles en la mรยบsica que te has estado perdiendo รขยย armรยณnicos vocales, sibilancia del hi-hat, texturas sutiles de instrumentos รขยย sin sobreamplificar la mezcla.
beyond_who_gamers_text: El audio espacial y la claridad de diรยกlogos en juegos en cascos AR/VR y auriculares gaming se benefician de un perfil de frecuencia adaptado a tu percepciรยณn real, no una curva genรยฉrica.
beyond_who_travellers_text: Al usar auriculares con cancelaciรยณn de ruido en aviones, trenes o entornos concurridos, el ajuste de frecuencia personalizado hace que el contenido basado en voz (llamadas, podcasts, audiolibros) sea mรยกs claro sin necesitar niveles de volumen inseguros.
beyond_devices_title: Funciona con Cualquier Dispositivo de Audio
beyond_devices_subtitle: Nuestra tecnologรยญa es agnรยณstica al dispositivo. Si tu dispositivo tiene bandas de frecuencia ajustables รขยย ya sea mediante un ecualizador integrado, API de firmware o app complementaria รขยย es compatible.
beyond_dev_earbuds_text: AirPods, Galaxy Buds, Sony, Bose y cualquier TWS con control de EQ
beyond_dev_headphones_text: Over-ear, on-ear, abiertos, cerrados รขยย con cable o inalรยกmbricos
beyond_dev_arvr_text: Meta Quest, Apple Vision Pro o cualquier casco con salida de audio
beyond_dev_eyewear: Gafas de Audio y Mรยกs
beyond_dev_eyewear_text: Gafas inteligentes, dispositivos de conducciรยณn รยณsea y cualquier dispositivo host con audio ajustable
beyond_cta_title: รยฟInteresado en Integraciรยณn de Consumo?
beyond_cta_text: Buscamos fabricantes de audio de consumo, desarrolladores de plataformas y socios tecnolรยณgicos para llevar la inteligencia de habla de frecuencia especรยญfica a dispositivos de escucha cotidianos. Si estรยกs construyendo la prรยณxima generaciรยณn de audio personal, hablemos.
beyond_cta_btn: Explorar Oportunidades de Colaboraciรยณn รขยย
hiw_no_documentation_of_finetuning: No documentation of fine-tuning rationale โ if audited, no evidence trail of why adjustments were made
hiw_adjust_retest_confirm_in: Adjust โ Re-test โ Confirm. In the same session. Statistical significance is verified using Thornton-Raffin critical difference tables. The system tracks longitudinal improvement per contrast per band across sessions.
footer_address: 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ, United Kingdom
hiw_how_does_it_sound: "How does it sound?" โ Clinicians ask subjective questions with no quantifiable answers
hiw_ucl_mpo_ls_dr: UCL ยท MPO ยท LS ยท DR ยท CR
hiw_algorithm_identifies_exactly_which: Algorithm identifies exactly which frequency bands need adjustment and by how much โ validated against 5 safety checks
hiw_calibration_is_stored_only: Calibration is stored โ only needs re-doing if you change the room, speaker, or position
priv_formspree_a_secure_form: Formspree โ a secure form processing service that receives your form data and forwards it to us via email. Formspree processes data in accordance with their own privacy policy. Data transmitted to Formspree is encrypted in transit (HTTPS/TLS).
hiw_35_return_visits_each_2: 3โ5 return visits, each repeating the same subjective loop โ costly for the clinic, frustrating for the patient
hiw_when_3_or_more: When 3 or more high-frequency bands receive simultaneous gain increases, perceived loudness exceeds their arithmetic sum (Keidser & Moore). The system applies a 1.5ร summation factor and limits total perceived HF increase to 8 dB per session.
hiw_standardise_quality_quantitative_pro: Standardise quality โ Quantitative protocols reduce variability between clinicians and clinics across trusts.
hiw_based_on_ching_dillon: Based on Ching, Dillon et al. (2001, NAL-NL2): as hearing loss increases, the ability to extract speech information diminishes even when sound is audible. The algorithm scales adjustments per-band based on the patient's threshold โ not a naive flat boost. At 66 dB HL, contribution drops ~50%.
hiw_differentiating_technology_offer_pat: Differentiating technology โ Offer patients verifiable proof of fitting quality that competitors cannot match.
priv_legitimate_interest_article_61f: Legitimate interest (Article 6(1)(f)) โ to respond to professional enquiries about partnership opportunities.
hiw_targeted_adjustments_the_multifactor: Targeted adjustments โ The multi-factor algorithm tells you exactly which bands need adjustment, calibrated to the patient's audiometric profile
hiw_the_gain_delta_is: The gain delta is bounded by each band's available dynamic range (UCL โ threshold). Patients with narrow dynamic range (< 30 dB) receive proportionally smaller adjustments to preserve comfort headroom.
priv_erasure_request_deletion_of: Erasure โ Request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten").
hiw_crossreferences_the_proposed_adjustm: Cross-references the proposed adjustment against the hearing device's Maximum Power Output to ensure the recommendation doesn't push the output level into saturation. Requires the actual gain table from fitting software.
hiw_clinical_documentation_every_decisio: Clinical documentation โ Every decision is evidence-based, auditable, and IEC 62304 traceable
hiw_works_with_your_existing: Works With Your Existing Fitting Software
hiw_verify_that_the_acoustic: Verify that the acoustic output at the eardrum matches prescriptive targets. This confirms the physical delivery of sound โ but not the perceptual outcome.
hiw_instead_of_how_does: Instead of "How does it sound?", you get "/s/ vs /ฮธ/ discrimination: 68% โ needs +1.19 dB at 4 kHz (bounded by EA factor 0.85, DR factor 0.70)". Every adjustment has a reason. Every reason has data.
priv_to_exercise_any_of: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at enquiries@novaural.com. We will respond within 30 days.
hiw_patient_frustration_30_of: Patient frustration โ 30% of hearing aid users abandon their devices within 12 months
priv_the_data_you_submit: The data you submit through the partnership form is used solely to:
hiw_the_verification_gap_in: The verification gap in current practice
hiw_after_rem_run_a: After REM, run a 20-minute verification session โ objective measurement of the patient's actual word discrimination
hiw_shorten_waiting_lists_faster: Shorten waiting lists โ Faster, more efficient fitting sessions free up clinic capacity for new patients.
priv_under_the_uk_gdpr: Under the UK GDPR, you have the right to:
priv_maintain_a_record_of: Maintain a record of our professional communications
hiw_100_onetime_use_per: ~ยฃ100 ยท One-time use per setup
hiw_if_unhappy_clinician_adjusts: If unhappy, clinician adjusts gains based on vague subjective feedback with no data on which sounds are problematic
priv_consent_by_voluntarily_submitting: Consent โ by voluntarily submitting the form, you consent to us processing the data you provide for the stated purpose.
hiw_the_software_plays_calibrated: The software plays calibrated reference tones through the loudspeaker
priv_we_do_not_use: We do not use any other third-party services that process your personal data (no analytics platforms, no advertising networks, no social media tracking pixels).
priv_we_will_never_use: We will never use your data for marketing newsletters, advertising, or any purpose other than responding to and managing your enquiry.
hiw_base_ea_dr_session: base ร EA ร DR ร session
hiw_fitting_session_ends_after: Fitting session ends after REM verification โ no measurement of actual word understanding
priv_evaluate_potential_partnership_or: Evaluate potential partnership or collaboration opportunities
priv_access_request_a_copy: Access โ Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
hiw_apply_your_formula_of: Apply your formula of choice โ NAL-NL2, DSLv5.0, or a manufacturer-based formula (Phonak APD, Oticon VAC+, etc.) โ to generate initial gain targets.
hiw_based_on_the_audiometric: Based on the audiometric profile, the system selects which phoneme contrasts to prioritise. Steep high-frequency loss? Prioritise fricatives (/s/ vs /ฮธ/). Flat moderate loss? Include stops and nasals. Severe HF loss? Flag for frequency lowering verification.
hiw_35_return_visits_each: 3โ5 return visits โ Each one essentially repeating the same subjective loop
hiw_from_phoneme_error_to: From Phoneme Error to Safe Gain Adjustment
priv_we_may_update_this: We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected on this page with an updated "Last updated" date. We encourage you to review this page periodically.
priv_this_website_is_not: This website is not directed at children under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe we have inadvertently collected such data, please contact us and we will delete it promptly.
priv_restriction_request_that_we: Restriction โ Request that we limit how we use your data.
hiw_reduce_staff_costs_shorter: Reduce staff costs โ Shorter sessions and fewer follow-ups mean lower cost per patient and higher throughput.
hiw_calibrated_minimal_pair_stimuli: Calibrated minimal pair stimuli โ each pair differing in exactly one phonemic segment โ are presented via a forced-choice paradigm. The patient selects what they hear: each error maps to a specific frequency band through the distinctive feature โ frequency correspondence table.
hiw_ready_to_see_it: Ready to See It in Action?
hiw_objective_phoneme_discrimination_sco: Objective phoneme discrimination scores โ Per-contrast, per-frequency, quantified across 3 intensity levels
priv_your_data_is_not: Your data is not sold, rented, or shared with third parties for their own purposes. However, we use the following service provider to process form submissions:
hiw_5_safety_validations_ucl: 5 safety validations โ UCL proximity, loudness summation, dynamic range, MPO headroom, and compression ratio are checked before any recommendation
hiw_patient_leaves_with_a: Patient leaves with a data-verified fitting โ fewer return visits, higher satisfaction, lower abandonment
hiw_evidence_for_commissioners_measurabl: Evidence for commissioners โ Measurable outcomes data supports service quality reporting and funding justification (CQC audit-ready).
priv_for_data_protection_purposes: For data protection purposes, Novaural Ltd is the data controller. If you have any questions about how we handle your data, please contact us at enquiries@novaural.com.
hiw_estimates_the_postadjustment_output: Estimates the post-adjustment output level and verifies it stays at least 7 dB below the patient's Uncomfortable Loudness Level (ASHA guideline: 5โ10 dB margin). If exceeded, the system caps the recommendation and flags the band.
priv_all_data_submitted_through: All data submitted through our website is transmitted over HTTPS/TLS encryption.
hiw_the_core_technology_that: The core technology that makes ReFittingLab universally compatible: NFM automatically maps each speech-relevant frequency to the closest adjustable band of any hearing device โ whether it has 4 bands (basic aid), 10 bands (mid-range), or 20 bands (premium clinical device). The system consolidates multiple speech frequency regions that fall within the resolution of a single band, weighting each by the magnitude of the discrimination deficit and spectral proximity. One evaluation → any device → optimal result regardless of band count.
hiw_datadriven_adjustments_resolve_more: Data-driven adjustments resolve more issues in the first fitting session. The traditional 3โ5 visit cycle compresses โ better outcomes, happier patients, more efficient clinics.
priv_summary_novaural_ltd_respects: Summary: Novaural Ltd respects your privacy. We collect minimal data, only through our partnership enquiry form. We do not use analytics, advertising trackers, or third-party cookies. Your data is never sold or shared for marketing purposes.
priv_we_only_collect_personal: We only collect personal data that you voluntarily provide through our Partnership Enquiry Form on the Partner With Us page. This may include:
hiw_where_refittinglab_fits_in: Where ReFittingLab Fits in Your Workflow
hiw_apply_the_recommendations_in: Apply the recommendations in your fitting software, re-test, and confirm measurable improvement โ all in the same session
priv_this_website_does_not: This website does not use cookies for tracking, analytics, or advertising.
priv_data_portability_request_your: Data portability โ Request your data in a structured, commonly used format.
priv_a_freetext_message_describing: A free-text message describing your enquiry
priv_we_do_not_collect: We do not collect data through any other means on this website.
footer_reg: Registered in England & Wales ยท Company No. 17120454
hiw_higher_conversion_rates_patients: Higher conversion rates โ Patients who experience measurable improvement in-session are more likely to commit to purchase.
hiw_retest_with_refittinglab_to: Re-test with ReFittingLab to confirm improvement. Document results with statistical significance verification (Thornton-Raffin critical difference). Discharge with confidence โ or schedule follow-up only if objective data warrants it.
hiw_firstsession_adjustments_are_conserv: First-session adjustments are conservatively bounded. Subsequent sessions can build on previous data, with the algorithm tracking longitudinal improvement per contrast per band โ enabling precise, progressive optimisation.
hiw_for_frequency_bands_involved: For frequency bands involved in temporal contrasts (voiced/voiceless stop consonants: /p/ vs /b/, /t/ vs /d/, /k/ vs /g/), the system detects compression ratios exceeding 3:1 โ which degrade Voice Onset Time discrimination (up to 19.4% intelligibility loss).
hiw_enter_the_audiogram_airbone: Enter the audiogram (air/bone conduction, UCL), current gain tables (G50/G65/G80/CR/MPO from your fitting software), and clinical context: experience level, tinnitus, hyperacusis, coupling type, bilateral status.
hiw_full_audit_trail_every: Full audit trail: every test, every recommendation, every re-test is documented and IEC 62304 traceable
hiw_trial_and_error_adjust: Trial and error โ Adjust gains, send patient home, wait for next appointment
hiw_every_test_result_every: Every test result, every recommendation, every safety check, every re-test is recorded in an IEC 62304 traceable audit trail. Useful for clinical governance, audits (NHS/CQC), and longitudinal patient outcomes tracking.
priv_if_you_are_unsatisfied: If you are unsatisfied with how we handle your data, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Information Commissioner's Office (ICO):
hiw_take_the_recommendations_and: Take the recommendations and apply them directly in Phonak Target, Oticon Genie 2, ReSound Smart Fit, or whichever fitting software you use. ReFittingLab tells you what to change, why, and how much is safe โ you stay in control.
hiw_place_the_sound_level: Place the sound level meter at the patient position (typically 1 metre from the speaker)
priv_under_the_uk_general: Under the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR) and the Data Protection Act 2018, we process your personal data on the basis of:
hiw_band_importance_follows_ansi: Band importance follows ANSI S3.5-1997 Speech Intelligibility Index weights. The 2โ4 kHz region contributes ~54% of speech intelligibility โ adjustments in these bands are computed and prioritised proportionally.
hiw_lower_return_rates_getting: Lower return rates โ Getting the fitting right the first time reduces costly device returns and exchanges.
hiw_refittinglab_doesnt_suggest_boost: ReFittingLab doesn't suggest "boost highs." It identifies which frequency band is causing which phoneme confusion through distinctive feature analysis, and calculates the minimum effective adjustment โ typically 0.5โ3 dB, bounded by 5 safety layers.
hiw_apply_refittinglabs_recommendations_: Apply ReFittingLab's recommendations in your fitting software. Adjust G65 for conversational speech, G50 for soft sounds, G80 for loud environments โ each adjustment mapped to a specific phoneme discrimination deficit and validated against the patient's dynamic range.
hiw_standard_audiometric_evaluation_airb: Standard audiometric evaluation: air/bone conduction, UCL, speech recognition threshold. This is your baseline.
hiw_read_the_spl_from: Read the SPL from the meter and enter it โ the software auto-adjusts output to match the target levels (50, 65, 80 dB SPL)
hiw_no_phonemelevel_data_if: No phoneme-level data โ If the patient says "I can't understand speech," the clinician doesn't know which frequencies are causing the issue
hiw_reduce_followup_visits_objective: Reduce follow-up visits โ Objective verification in the first session means fewer return appointments clogging waiting lists.
hiw_patient_goes_home_with: Patient goes home with "come back in a few days and tell me how it sounds"
hiw_the_system_uses_interchangeable: The system uses interchangeable language packs with language-specific phoneme inventories, minimal pairs curated through rigorous phonological criteria, and fully localised clinical terminology. Currently calibrated for English, with the architecture designed to support any additional language โ simply add a validated language pack and the entire system adapts automatically.
priv_access_to_enquiry_data: Access to enquiry data is restricted to authorised Novaural personnel only.
priv_we_regularly_review_our: We regularly review our security practices.
hiw_for_patients_with_narrow: For patients with narrow dynamic range (< 30 dB between threshold and UCL), adjustments exceeding 3 dB are flagged with specific warnings. The recommendation is bounded to preserve comfortable headroom.
hiw_what_happens_during_a: What Happens During a ReFittingLab Session
hiw_what_happens_today_during: โ What happens today during fine-tuning
priv_novaural_ltd_is_a: Novaural Ltd is a company registered in England & Wales (Company No. 17120454), with its registered address at 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ, United Kingdom.
hiw_sentences_are_presented_with: Sentences are presented with calibrated noise (ICRA/ISTS) at multiple signal-to-noise ratios (+5, 0, โ5 dB). Calculates the patient's SNR loss โ how many extra dB of signal they need compared to a normal listener.
priv_rectification_request_correction_of: Rectification โ Request correction of inaccurate data.
hiw_discrimination_data_is_deviceindepen: Discrimination data is device-independent โ it characterises the patient's perceptual profile, not the hearing device. When the patient changes devices, only steps (b)โ(d) are re-executed with the new band configuration. No re-evaluation needed.
hiw_readminister_the_tests_that: Re-administer the tests that showed deficits. If the adjustment was correct, discrimination scores improve measurably. Statistical significance is verified using Thornton-Raffin critical difference tables, with full longitudinal tracking across sessions.
hiw_program_the_hearing_aids: Program the hearing aids in Phonak Target, Oticon Genie 2, ReSound Smart Fit, Signia Connexx, Widex Compass GPS, or any other fitting software. Configure coupling, feedback management, features.
hiw_the_algorithm_maps_each: The algorithm maps each phoneme error to its acoustic correlate (distinctive feature โ frequency band โ NFM band matching), then computes the gain delta using a multi-factor formula that considers hearing threshold, dynamic range, session history, and effective audibility. Every recommendation passes through 5 independent safety checks before presentation.
priv_for_any_privacyrelated_questions: For any privacy-related questions or requests, please contact:
priv_we_may_store_a: We may store a language preference in your browser's localStorage (a browser feature similar to cookies) if multi-language support is activated in the future. This is a strictly functional preference and contains no personal data. It is stored only on your device and is never transmitted to our servers.
priv_you_can_clear_localstorage: You can clear localStorage at any time through your browser settings.
hiw_extend_to_50_db: Extend to 50 dB (audibility of soft sounds) and 80 dB (comfort and tolerance). This maps to G50, G65, and G80 adjustments across the full dynamic range โ not just conversational level.
priv_your_data_may_be: Your data may be processed by Formspree's servers, which may be located outside the United Kingdom. Where this occurs, we ensure that appropriate safeguards are in place in accordance with UK GDPR requirements.
priv_we_take_appropriate_technical: We take appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data, including:
hiw_fewer_visits_more_gets: Fewer visits โ More gets resolved in the first session because you have data, not guesses
priv_we_retain_partnership_enquiry: We retain partnership enquiry data for as long as necessary to evaluate and respond to the enquiry, and for a reasonable period thereafter in case of follow-up communication. If no partnership materialises, we will delete your data within 12 months of your submission unless you request earlier deletion.
priv_object_object_to_processing: Object โ Object to processing based on legitimate interest.

meta_desc_collab: Clinical validation partnerships for hearing aid verification. Join NHS trusts, audiologists, and research institutions working with Novaural.
meta_title_privacy: Privacy Policy โ Novaural Ltd | Data Protection
meta_desc_privacy: Novaural Ltd Privacy Policy โ How we collect, use, and protect your personal data. GDPR and UK Data Protection Act 2018 compliant.
collab_ph_message: Briefly describe your interest in partnering with Novaural. What challenges are you facing? How do you see our technology fitting into your work?
